narrative: Tanker, port-state-control inspection findings: lifeboat inoperative on starboard side. EPIRB battery expired. DOC suspended by flag administration. No DPA appointed. Oil Record Book gap of 14 days, entries inconsistent with tanks. Garbage record book not maintained. Ballast water treatment bypass observed in port. ECDIS charts outdated by 60 days for the next leg. SOPEP missing onboard. STCW certificate for second engineer expired. Work-rest hours violation on bridge watch (fell short of 10-hour rest). ISPS access control failure (gate left open).
